title: stachys ballota
intro: Stachys ballota, also known as woundwort, is a perennial herb native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, ulcers, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stachys ballota include reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair, making it a popular remedy for burns, cuts, and other skin injuries. Stachys ballota can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
